headings.usage: H1, H2, massive numbers, marquee. ALWAYS uppercase. Super tight tracking.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, buttons. Clean, geometric legibility.

scales.h1: text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[8vw] leading-[0.85] tracking-tighter uppercase
scales.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-7xl leading-none tracking-tight uppercase
scales.overline: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-silver font-bold

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise grain overlay on the background to avoid digital flatness. No generic gradients.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) for structural layout and cards.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use Solid Backgrounds with hard borders or Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border-t border-white/10) for floating elements.

motion.scrolling: MANDATORY: Use lenis for smooth, momentum-based scrolling. This is critical for the premium feel.
motion.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal for the H1 text. Wrap text lines in overflow-hidden divs, and animate the inner text sliding up from y: 100%.
motion.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion useInView or whileInView. Elements should slide up slightly (y: 40) and fade in. Stagger children for lists/grids.
motion.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero background and editorial product images (y-axis translation linked to scroll).

layouts.spacing: Generous. Use py-24, py-32 for section padding. gap-8 to gap-16 in grids.
layouts.hero: Full height (min-h-screen). Absolute positioning for background image with heavy bg-black/60 overlay. Text locked to bottom-left or dead-center with massive impact.
layouts.features_bento: Bento Grid strategy. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Mix spans: col-span-8 row-span-2, col-span-4 row-span-1. Asymmetry is key.
layouts.editorial_images: Clipped frames. Images shouldn't just be full width; they should be framed in elegant aspect ratios (like 4:3 or 16:9) with sharp edges and spotlight glow.

sections_blueprint.layout: Fixed top, w-full, z-50. Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50 border-b border-white/10). Logo on left, direct download button on right.

min-h-screen relative flex flex-col justify-end pb-24 px-8. Background image of dark stadium/coach with black overlay. Massive kinetic typography masking reveal: 'SEE THE GAME. BREAK IT DOWN.' Action button pointing to downloads.
py-8 border-y border-white/10 bg-surface/50. Slow continuous scroll. Text: 'FILM STUDY • PLAYLIST CREATION • TACTICAL ANALYSIS • COACHING •'. Font: Anton, text-3xl, text-silver.
py-32 px-8. Numbered chapters. Grid layout. Left column: Massive number '01' in Anton. Right column: Statement about the coaching edge. Chapters: 01 The Film, 02 The Cut, 03 The Victory.
py-32 px-8. Editorial product photography. High-contrast cards showcasing: 'Create Clips', 'Build Playlists', 'Tag Plays'. Use bento layout. Images should look like glowing screens in dark rooms.

py-32 px-8 bg-surface. Title 'DOWNLOAD STRATAVIZ'. Grid of 3 tactical cards: Windows, Mac (Intel), Mac (Apple Silicon). Cards have 1px border, hover to lift and border-primary_orange. Direct file download icons.
py-24 px-8 border-t border-white/10 flex flex-col items-center. Massive brand name 'STRATAVIZ' at text-[15vw]. Copyright and legal below.

hero_background.description: Aerial view of an illuminated sports stadium at night. Perfect deep dark background for hero.

coach_manifesto.description: Football coach back at dusk. Use in the manifesto section for emotional resonance.

feature_screen_1.description: Laptop in a dark room. Represents the film breakdown / editing UI.

feature_screen_2.description: Person using laptop in dark. Represents tagging and playlist building.

feature_screen_3.description: Black Nike basketball in dark. Sports texture for features.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Use bg-black/50 or bg-black/60 overlays on hero.
accessibility.aria: Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative animations like the marquee.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='download-mac-intel-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end, Awwwards-level marketing site. NO generic layouts. Push boundaries.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for layouts, NOT Shadcn cards, to maintain creative freedom and asymmetry.
MANDATORY: Import google fonts Anton and Manrope in index.css or via next/font (if next) / head.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling at the root level.
Implement the kinetic text reveal: Split text into lines, wrap each in overflow-hidden, animate Y from 100% to 0%.
Downloads section: 3 prominent tactical cards. Each should have a direct download feel (e.g. icon + 'Download for Windows (.exe)').
Never use purely transparent backgrounds on navbars if content scrolls underneath. Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50.
Ensure 'data-testid' is on all buttons and download links.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Do not center-align paragraphs. Use optical alignment.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (py-24, py-32).
Never use generic AI emojis for icons. Use Phosphor Icons.
All interactions need micro-animations (hover states, scaling).
